gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/433)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/433)

parts.text: دَاوُدَ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ أَبِي سُلَيْمَانَ الْحَذَّاءِ

text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) نِعْمَ الدُّهْنُ الْبَانُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Dawood Bin Is’haq Abu Suleyman Al Haza’a, from Muhammad Bin Al Fayz who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The best of the (massaging) oils is the frankincense (oil)’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Dawud ibn Ishaq abu Sulayman al-Hadhdha’ from Muhammad ibn al-Fayd who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Frankincense oil is a fine oil.’”
